findings.evidence: PR lines 75-81 prove injectivity of `Quotient.lift p ...`; Mathlib already provides `Setoid.lift_injective_iff_ker_eq_of_le` at `mathlib/Mathlib/Data/Setoid/Basic.lean:358-360` and `Setoid.ker_eq_lift_of_injective` at `:351-352`.
findings.fix: Keep this helper private or inline the existing `Setoid.lift_injective_iff_ker_eq_of_le` use at the regular theorem; expose only the deck-specific regular statement if needed.
findings.issue: `orbitQuotientToBase_injective_of_exists_apply_eq` exposes a special case of the generic quotient-lift injectivity API.

summary: The main regular deck-orbit quotient equivalence appears new, but one public helper is a deck-specific wrapper around Mathlib's generic quotient-lift injectivity criterion and should not be added as API.
